suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand the 'CTA Link Buttons' section to document the Button component's internal vs external URL branching: href starting with '/' or '#' uses Next.js Link for SPA routing, while other URLs use plain <a> with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'. Note that this means internal links cannot be opened in a new tab via the Button component without additional props.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature navigation-wiring-and-links commit ba97f33 introduced branching logic in src/components/ui/Button.tsx:57-77. Current AGENTS.md only says 'Prefer <Button as="a" href="/path"> over nesting <Link><Button>'.

rejectedObservations.observation: Agent-browser viewport limitation means responsive testing at 375px/768px/1024px/1440px was done via CSS class review rather than visual testing.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented — AGENTS.md 'agent-browser viewport limitation' section already documents this constraint and the workaround.

rejectedObservations.observation: Next.js Image component defaults to lazy loading automatically, so explicit loading='lazy' props are unnecessary.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous — Standard framework knowledge that doesn't warrant documentation in project-specific files.
